assertions.text: Asks pointed questions before writing prose, grounding the section in specifics
Pulls specific details from other sections of the lesson file to inform the draft
Generates suggested prose for the target section
Flags sentences or claims the author should verify — does not assume all inferences are correct
Prose sounds like the author (direct, first-person, honest) not generic AI writing
Provides a readback or verification section checking whether prose matches author's intent
Stays focused on the requested section, does not draft the entire lesson
